title: Subitem / Item Dependencies
excerpt: I’m looking to connect subitems as being dependent on main items. I can’t seem to find a way to connect subitems to items for date dependencies. Is this possible?

posts.author: AMontero (Adri Montero)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking to connect subitems as being dependent on main items. I can’t seem to find a way to connect subitems to items for date dependencies. Is this possible?

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@AMontero

The simple answer is no, not currently.

However, one alternative might be to have a subitem created for every item that is created that would basically contain the date from the parent.

Even that would need some additional work. But it is possible.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @AMontero! Hopefully the wonderful @JCorrell’s suggestions helped but if not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
